overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked elevated walkway in Night City. The player traverses an overlook with panoramic neon-lit city views featuring the iconic 'enjoy!' billboard, passes through a narrow vending machine alley, continues along elevated promenades, and descends to street level, showcasing the game's atmospheric ray-traced lighting and dense cyberpunk urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook walkway with panoramic city views

events.description: panning right to admire the neon cityscape and billboards

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along the elevated overlook, admiring the rain-soaked cyberpunk cityscape and illuminated billboards

entered.detail: tall illuminated vertical billboard displaying a face with 'enjoy!' text in yellow and black
metal railings along the elevated walkway edge overlooking the city
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers with holographic advertisements and neon signage
large red-lit industrial crane structure towering over the buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked elevated overlook in a cyberpunk metropolis. The camera moves along a concrete walkway bordered by metal railings, offering panoramic views of a dense neon-lit cityscape. The iconic 'enjoy!' billboard dominates the view while red industrial cranes loom in the hazy distance. The atmosphere is thick with rain and atmospheric lighting, with no other pedestrians present.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with vending machines and burning barrel

events.description: turning right into narrow alleyway away from the open city view
passing bright red vending machines and a burning trash barrel providing warm light

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow enclosed alley, passing illuminated vending machines and a small fire in a metal barrel

entered.detail: bright red automated vending machines with glowing display screens
metal barrel containing an open fire providing orange warm light
simple concrete bench against the alley wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow service alley between buildings, sheltering from the rain. The camera passes a burning trash barrel casting flickering orange light on wet concrete walls, followed by a row of bright red vending machines. The space is enclosed and intimate compared to the open overlook, with the city skyline no longer visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated promenade with safety railings overlooking lower districts

events.description: exiting narrow alley back to elevated walkway with city views
curving left along the elevated walkway following the building contour

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved elevated promenade, looking through metal railings at the city below

entered.detail: tall potted palm trees placed at intervals along the walkway
aged concrete benches for seating along the railing
various glowing holographic advertisements visible through the railings

segments.scene_description: Returning to the elevated walkway, the camera moves along a curved promenade lined with metal safety railings and potted palm plants. The path offers views through the railings to the lower city districts with various holographic billboards visible in the distance. The walkway features weathered concrete benches and follows the contour of the building, maintaining the rainy cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel entrance approach with stairway descent to street level

events.description: turning left at the hotel corner toward the stairway
descending concrete stairs to street level
arriving at street level with yellow crosswalk and pedestrian area

agents.ego_description: turning at the hotel entrance and descending the stairs to reach the street level crosswalk

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking across the yellow crosswalk at street level

entered.detail: blue neon sign reading 'HOテル' with Japanese characters indicating hotel
traditional red paper lanterns hanging from the building facade
stairway leading down from elevated walkway to street level
bright yellow zebra crossing stripes on the wet asphalt street

segments.scene_description: The final segment begins with a turn at a building displaying a blue neon 'HOテル' sign and red paper lanterns. The camera descends a concrete stairway from the elevated walkway down to street level, transitioning from the semi-covered promenade to the open street. Upon reaching the bottom, the scene opens to a wet asphalt street with a bright yellow crosswalk, where a distant pedestrian is visible walking in the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a panoramic elevated overlook through narrow urban corridors and finally down to the rain-slicked city streets. It begins on a concrete walkway bordered by metal railings, where the camera glides past the iconic enjoy! billboard and distant industrial cranes under a heavy rain. As the camera moves forward, the open vista vanishes and the scene shifts into a sheltered service alley, passing a flickering orange trash fire and a row of bright red vending machines. The path then opens back up onto a curved promenade lined with potted palms and holographic billboards before turning toward a building adorned with a blue neon hotel sign and red lanterns. Finally, the camera descends a concrete stairway, transitioning from the elevated heights to the wet asphalt of the street level where a lone pedestrian walks across a bright yellow crosswalk.
